name: MP7 | 枯焦之色
descriptionEn: Versatile but expensive, the German-made MP7 SMG is the perfect choice for high-impact close-range combat. It has been spray-painted in a sun-dappled pattern. The Phoenix is not a symbol of destruction... it's a symbol of rebirth - Valeria Jenner, Revolutionary
descriptionZh: 非常好用，但价格昂贵，德国制造的 MP7 微型冲锋枪非常适合高强度的近距离作战。 这把武器被漆上了阳光斑驳图案。 “凤凰”不是毁灭的象征… 恰恰相反，它象征着重生 - 革命者瓦莱里娅.琴纳
